---
title: "GSE224867 — DLBCL response to doxorubicin (ADR)"
output:
  html_document:
    self_contained: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
de <- read.csv("tables/de_limma_results.csv")
```

## PCA
```{r}
knitr::include_graphics("figures/pca.png")
```

## Volcano
```{r}
knitr::include_graphics("figures/volcano.png")
```

## Top genes (by adj.P.Val)
```{r}
head(de[order(de$adj.P.Val), c("gene_id","logFC","P.Value","adj.P.Val")], 20)
```

## Notes / limitations
This uses GEO `norm_counts`; DE is run with limma on log2(x+1) (or voom+limma if integer-like).
